headline: Dusty's Burger Trough Unleashes the 10lb Bean Bucket
summary: Trough locations worldwide are reporting mass fluid-bean casualties following the launch of the new promotional item.

headline: THE SANDWET

headline: WHAT IS THIS?! EXPLAIN THIS!!
summary: Somebody needs to take a look at this ok? They don't want us to know something, and I don't know what it is or who it is that doesn't want us to know
